blocks.content: We lost. I have a favor to ask—please keep this matter a secret.

blocks.speaker: Leader
blocks.content: We lost. I have a favor to ask—please keep this matter a secret.
Huh? Didn't you just say you'd flatten our ass and expel us?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Huh? Didn't you just say you'd flatten our ass and expel us?
Despite the humiliation that made his body tremble, the leader of the mercenary group was someone who could face reality.
He needed to endure for the future of himself and his comrades.
I'm sorry! Just help me this once! You're going to be a mage too. But I'm your senior, so there's no need to break my rice bowl, right?

blocks.speaker: Leader
blocks.content: I'm sorry! Just help me this once! You're going to be a mage too. But I'm your senior, so there's no need to break my rice bowl, right?
Dante shook his head as if finding their pleas insufficient.
The mercenaries blushed as they realized what the boy was asking for.
Eventually, even the four standing behind the leader bowed politely and apologized.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Consider our situation. We need to make a living too, don't we?
Dante, finally satisfied, put his hand on the leader's shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Don't worry. I was just bored during the vacation and decided to have some fun. By the way, aren't you being a bit too careless? I wonder how you got the official license?
At that moment, the door opened and a woman came in.
The mercenaries instinctively straightened their bent backs and pretended as if nothing had happened.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Oh my! It's over already. Ah, what a pity.
The woman had curly, chin-length hair sticking to her cheek.
Her playful face looked as if she were in her early 20s, but she was actually over thirty.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: You are... Kylline?
She was a woman who worked in the academic journal editing department under Teachers' Association and was a correspondent who traveled around the kingdom to write reports on magic academies.

The articles she writes are published in a magazine called <Spirit>, which is distributed to magic academies across the kingdom, so it was only a matter of time before she would become famous once they were published.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: I came after hearing rumors, and you certainly lived up to them. Dante, is this miserables scene all created by your hands?
As Kylline struck an exaggerated pose, the accompanying photographer took pictures with an optical camera.
The mercenaries were at a loss as to what to do in this embarrassing situation.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: No, it wasn't. How could I have defeated them alone without the help of my seniors? I asked for practical training, and they kindly agreed. I learned a lot. Thank you, seniors.
When Dante turned around, even the most perceptive mages quickly adjusted their expressions.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Haha! This much is nothing. Still, it was impressive. Truly, you are the greatest star of the kingdom, aren't you?
Kylline turned around with a gleam in her eyes.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Oh my! Do you know Dante? As expected, the kingdom's proud promising talent is something else. Even though he's still a student, rumors about him are spreading among the active mages.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Of course. I sometimes talk about Dante with my colleagues. I believe that one day Dante will become a first-class Archmage.
Kylline meticulously took notes during the interview with the leader.
<Spirit> has been a popular magazine to begin with, but on days when an article about Dante is published, sales increase by 1.5 times.
Dante's appearance was beautiful enough to capture the hearts of girls, and the jealous attention of men must have been no exception.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: 'Oh, how cute. You've grown up so well, my Dante.'
It would be safe to say that Kylline, who had been interviewing Dante since he was young, had risen along with Dante.
It was also thanks to Dante that she was able to rise to become the best reporter in the kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Allright, now that the interview is over, let's go have a party. Teachers' Association will be treating us generously!
As Dante left the hideout, the butler of Airhain Family, who had been waiting outside, approached with a box.

blocks.speaker: Butler
blocks.content: Young Master Dante, Lady Olivia has sent you a package.
From my mentor? What's this all of a sudden?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: From my mentor? What's this all of a sudden?
I'm not sure myself... But I was instructed to deliver it personally.

blocks.speaker: Butler
blocks.content: I'm not sure myself... But I was instructed to deliver it personally.
Even Dante, who had nothing to fear in the world, would be humbled by Olivia's words.
She was his teacher and benefactor who recognized his talent from a young age and had him admitted to the Royal Magic Academy.
Of course, the same was true for his classmates, Closer and Savina.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I see. Give it to me.
When he received the parcel and opened it, a thick form came out.
Dante read it one page at a time, and his eyebrows furrowed.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: What's this? It's an application for transferring academy?
Closer and Savina peered over his shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: The application included not only Dante's profile but also theirs.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: What's this, Dante? Huh? What's going on?
It seems that Master has been temporarily appointed as the principal of a certain academy.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: If we want to study there together, we're invited to join...

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Then of course we should go. If Master is going, how can we not follow?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Where is it? Does it not say which academy is it?

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: No, Alpheas Magic Academy. But where is this academy located?
Students from Bashka had little interest in regional information.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Dante's group only knew that it was one of the top five prestigious academies in the kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: Oh my, Alpheas Magic Academy? And with Miss Olivia as the temporary principal? This is a huge event.
Alpheas Magic Academy is ranked 4th among magic academies.
It's located in the city of Creas.

blocks.speaker: Kylline
blocks.content: The most famous alumnus is the current head of the Magic Association, Mr. Micaea Gaold.
Ah, so Mr. Gaold is from there.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: The mention of the 4th rank didn't impress them much, but hearing the name Gaold changed their expressions.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: If it was the academy where one of the five certified Archmages in the kingdom had studied, they would be able to save face even if they transferred.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Let's go and see. Anyway, school is starting nationwide now. We can transfer to match it.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Yes. Master will also be taking up her post then.
Dante took the letter and left the application form to Savina.
They could discuss the details when they met; for now, he was just happy that something interesting had come up in his otherwise dull routine.
Dante, who was watching the sunset falling down the mountain, looked back at his friends and smiled.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Sounds fun, right? Alpheas Magic Academy.
Where is Shirone?
The second half of Alpheas Magic Academy has begun.
From the morning, the main gate was crowded with carriages carrying students.
A bizarre scene was created where young students accompanied by their parents were crying and begging because they did not want to go to academy.
On the other hand, the adolescent boys crossed the main gate with indifferent expressions, as if they were embarrassed to even be attended to by the butler.
The entrance ceremony was scheduled for 11 a.m., so the students returned to their accommodations and unpacked their bags.
Shirone, who arrived early in the morning, put the books he brought on the bookshelf and laid out his clothes and daily necessities.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Shirone!
His friends burst through the door and came in.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Nade! Iruki!
Shirone, with a big smile, ran over to them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have something amazing!
Then they stared blankly at each other.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Okay. Let's take turns. Shirone, you go first.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Allright. I went to Galliant Island with Amy…!
Nade suddenly grabbed him by the collar.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: What! You… No way… That…! What the hell! You traitor! I'm so jealous!
Shirone's face turned red.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! That's not it. Just listen.
Euaaaa! This is ridiculous. I thought that no matter how long I stayed single, I'd at least beat Shirone. How could this happen...!
Nade was on the verge of losing his mind.
Even Iruki's pupils were shaking, indicating that this issue was indeed a significant dilemma for boys.
Only after Shirone firmly denied the assumption could he start his story.
An hour quickly passed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow. You really… survived. That was a very dangerous situation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's true, but the final war. It's, what can I say, so serious that it doesn't even sound serious.
The impression of Heaven was so strong that Nade and Iruki fell into deep thought for a long time.
On the other hand, Shirone, who felt relieved after sharing his story, wanted to hear how his friends had spent their time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now you tell me. What amazing things happened during your vacation?
The two looked at each other, and Iruki spoke first.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I ate crayfish-flavored ice cream.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A giant spider the size of a fist appeared in my workshop.
Haha! You really had fun.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn it!
Nade pushed Shirone's cheek with his fist.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Ouch! What's that for?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: You had such an exciting vacation all by yourself! And with the super beautiful Senior Amy!
I told you, I almost died!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And what's with 'super beautiful Amy'? That's childish! Ugh!
While Nade was slapping Shirone's face again, Iruki was pounding the ground in regret.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Really a shame. I shouldn't have pretended to be crazy and gone back to my parents' house.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I'm also curious about that magic, Ataraxia or whatever. Can you show it to me sometime?
Huh? Ataraxia?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'd like to, but maybe next time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll show you when there's a chance.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Oh? Saving it for later, huh? Fine, then I'll keep my new magic a secret for now too.
The mention of new magic made Shirone's eyes sparkle.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: What is it? Hm? What kind of magic is it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's a secret. Let me give you a hint. Should I say it's a secret weapon that can defeat you?
After saying that, Iruki turned to look at Nade and asked.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: By the way, what about you? You didn't just play around during the vacation, did you?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Oh, I was insanely busy.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I'm studying alchemy these days.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I've been reinforcing some of the magic needed for that field.
Although alchemy is a major branch of magic, it wasn't a subject taught at the magic academy.
Alchemy is a vast discipline, and alchemists are trained separately at the Alchemy Foundation.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Are you sure about this? Getting a mage's certification would be more advantageous if you want to become a magic engineer.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Of course, but I also want to learn materials science.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Functions begin with forms, and the beginning of forms is the essence.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I thought it was important to understand the basics of alchemy.
They heard the dormitory supervisor's voice from the hallway.

blocks.speaker: Supervisor
blocks.content: The entrance ceremony is about to begin. Students, please gather in the central hall.
All students from Class One to Class Ten gathered in the training grounds.
Shirone looked for Alpheas on the platform, but for some reason he was nowhere to be seen.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: He's on a six-month suspension.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: An interim principal is coming today.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I don't know who it is, but I hope they won't make us study too hard.
As the newly appointed principal appeared on stage, murmurs spread through here and there.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: This… of all people, it had to be that person.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Jerome Olivia. Former principal of the Royal Magic Academy.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Probably a certified second-grade Archmage.
Shirone looked closely at Olivia.
She looked much younger than her age, and above all, she was beautiful.
The teachers were lined up on both sides, and they all looked tense.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: 'What a great person. Principal of Royal Magic Academy....'
Olivia waited until the students' commotion died down before she began her speech.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Hello. My name is Jerome Olivia, and I will be serving as your new principal starting this semester.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Although my position is temporary, I promise to do my best to teach and guide you during my term.
